narrative: Currently a Machine Learning Engineer at Unacademy with four years of experience, this candidate brings product‑company exposure and solid hands‑on work with Elasticsearch and Haystack, directly supporting search and retrieval pipelines, plus scikit‑learn for model development. Verified skill depth was the strongest factor pushing the ranking, reflecting clear evidence of competence in the listed tools. Their background also shows familiarity with vector databases like Milvus and Qdrant, aligning with the role’s focus on modern retrieval architectures. However, the profile falls short on the target experience band (5‑9 years), is based in Vizag rather than Pune/Noida, and shows modest platform engagement and minor credibility flags.
